calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Additional Bond
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Order (1)Granting Full Authority Under The Independent Administration Of Estates Act Pursuant To Probate Code 10450 And (2)Increasing Bond
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The certified copy of the will dated Nov-08-2005, original will lodged in Clark County Nevada, is admitted to probate. Kimberley J. Reinders is appointed Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $90,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two-weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Mar-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
